overall.description: A cinematic walk through a rain-soaked cyberpunk city at night, featuring neon-lit buildings, holographic advertisements, and futuristic vehicles. The footage appears to be from a high-quality game engine, likely Cyberpunk 2077, with the camera following a character through busy urban intersections and narrow streets.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered street beneath elevated highway with neon storefronts

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet street beneath an elevated highway structure, passing parked vehicles and neon signs

notable_agents.action: character in green jacket and hat standing in street then walking away to the right
red-haired character in blue jacket walking ahead toward the intersection

entered.detail: large concrete overpass structure spanning overhead with metal supports
tall cylindrical building wrapped with horizontal purple neon light strips
sleek black cars with glowing accents parked along the curb
rain-soaked street surface reflecting neon lights in pink and purple hues
tall buildings covered with bright neon advertisements and holographic displays

segments.scene_description: Walking along a rain-soaked street beneath an elevated highway, surrounded by towering buildings with purple neon lighting and parked futuristic vehicles. The wet asphalt reflects the vibrant neon signs overhead as the camera moves forward through the sparse crowd.

scene_state.functional_zone: large illuminated intersection with holographic billboard

events.description: exits covered street into open intersection with large yellow crosswalk
stops at crosswalk to wait for passing futuristic vehicles

agents.ego_description: approaching and entering the crosswalk, following the red-haired character across the wide intersection toward the holographic billboard

notable_agents.action: red-haired character leading the way across the intersection
black futuristic car waiting at the intersection

entered.detail: massive digital screen displaying a woman's face with purple neon border
broad pedestrian crossing with thick yellow stripes and X WALK markings
short black posts with yellow stripes separating pedestrian and vehicle areas
wide open space between tall buildings with multiple road crossings

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the covered street into a vast open intersection dominated by a massive holographic billboard. The camera follows a red-haired character across the yellow-striped crosswalk, stopping briefly as traffic approaches.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy intersection center with passing traffic

events.description: futuristic sports cars pass through the intersection from right to left
resumes walking to complete crossing after traffic clears

agents.ego_description: waiting in the middle of the intersection for traffic to clear, then continuing across while observing the holographic billboard and passing vehicles

notable_agents.action: silver sports car driving through the intersection
red sports car passing by in the opposite direction

entered.detail: modern glass building with red neon trim and large entrance
tall pole with glowing green walk signal

segments.scene_description: Standing in the center of the rain-slicked intersection as futuristic sports cars speed past. The massive holographic billboard glows brightly overhead as the camera waits for a gap in traffic before completing the crossing toward the commercial building entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow pedestrian street with graffiti walls and red neon signage

events.description: exits intersection onto sidewalk with building overhangs
moves into narrower street with prominent red neon lighting and graffiti-covered walls

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk past pedestrians with umbrellas, moving into a narrower street lined with graffiti and red neon signs

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with glowing red umbrella walking in opposite direction
shirtless pedestrian with hat walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: concrete wall covered with red and black spray paint graffiti tags
building trim and signs glowing with bright red neon light
opening to a tighter street between tall buildings
extended roof structure providing shelter from rain

segments.scene_description: Leaving the open intersection behind, the camera moves along a narrow sidewalk beneath building overhangs. The environment shifts to feature prominent red neon lighting and graffiti-covered walls as pedestrians with umbrellas pass by in the rain.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sheltered, neon-lit underpass into a sprawling urban intersection before narrowing into a crowded commercial alley. It begins by gliding along a rain-soaked street beneath an elevated highway, where purple neon signs reflect off the wet asphalt and parked futuristic vehicles. As the camera emerges from the cover of the highway, the scene opens into a vast intersection dominated by a massive, glowing holographic billboard and a red-haired character crossing yellow-striped pavement. The perspective lingers momentarily amidst the spray of speeding sports cars before completing the crossing and turning toward a commercial building entrance. Finally, the environment shifts from the open plaza to a narrow sidewalk beneath building overhangs, where the lighting turns a prominent red and the walls become layered with graffiti.
